name: Build and Test Script

scripts.prebuild: npm run lint && npm run type-check
scripts.copy-assets: cp -r electron out/ && cp package.json out/
scripts.test-build: npm run build && npm run electron-pack --dir
scripts.test-package: npm run build && npm run electron-pack

build-steps: 2. Run type checking: npm run type-check
4. Build Next.js app: npm run build
5. Copy Electron files: npm run copy-assets
6. Package with Electron Builder: npm run electron-pack
